query:
SELECT tiabCustomerId, companyName, firstName, lastName, internalCustomerExternalId
FROM tiab_customers 
WHERE companyName NOT LIKE '%Zambrero%'
ORDER BY companyName
LIMIT 20 OFFSET 17;
